claim_boundary: This report prepares data-processing and training campaigns. It is not predictive EFIT/P-EFIT admission evidence and does not launch GPU training.

pre_run_admission_gates: dataset SHA-256 must match the supervised dataset report
converted feature-provenance audit must have no blocked features
original public-source audit must be source_ready
compute host must be explicitly declared as workstation or external_cloud
weights_out must not be under storage-host dataset storage

execution_host_policy: The storage host is storage-only; execute training only on this workstation or external cloud compute with storage-mounted or copied data.

gpu_budget_estimates.blocking_condition: full-output trainer still required before predictive admission
gpu_budget_estimates.gpu_class: single 16-24 GB CUDA GPU or CPU fallback
gpu_budget_estimates.target: load dataset, verify splits, run one short fit/evaluation dry campaign

gpu_budget_estimates.blocking_condition: requires implementation of full-output trainer and admitted input-feature provenance
gpu_budget_estimates.target: one full-output neural-equilibrium training run with flux, pressure, q-profile, LCFS, and axis heads

gpu_budget_estimates.blocking_condition: requires single-seed trainer and stable holdout metric schema
gpu_budget_estimates.gpu_class: one to four 24-80 GB CUDA GPUs
gpu_budget_estimates.target: five seeds, architecture sweep, uncertainty calibration, and holdout reports

gpu_budget_estimates.blocking_condition: large numeric payloads must be pulled to storage-host storage and checksum-verified first
gpu_budget_estimates.gpu_class: single A10/A100-class GPU for first pass; A100/H100 for sweeps
gpu_budget_estimates.target: download, checksum, preprocess, split, and train neural-transport baselines

gpu_budget_estimates.blocking_condition: requires acquired public or collaborator-provided matched reconstruction artefacts
gpu_budget_estimates.gpu_class: single 24-80 GB CUDA GPU after CPU-side conversion
gpu_budget_estimates.target: matched EFIT/P-EFIT or documented public equilibrium artefacts converted into strict reference reports

gpu_budget_estimates.blocking_condition: requires at least one admitted external equilibrium reference set beyond MAST EFM candidate data
gpu_budget_estimates.target: multi-dataset training, seed repeats, uncertainty, latency, and strict admission evidence

blocked_before_admission: full-output trainer must be executed on workstation or external cloud compute and publish holdout metrics
strict neural-equilibrium reference admission must pass on the exact trained weight checksum

ragged_target_policy.padding: NaN for coordinates and False for validity mask

prepared_dataset_lanes.next_action: run the dry-run trainer locally, then execute explicitly on this workstation or external cloud compute when compute is reserved
download deferred payloads to storage-host storage, verify checksums, then build processed transport tensors

manifests.large_numeric_files_policy: deferred: files are multi-GB and should be pulled on storage/GPU target before training or validation campaign
manifests.title: QLKNN10D training set

manifests.large_numeric_files_policy: deferred: files are multi-GB and should be pulled on storage/GPU target before training or validation campaign
manifests.title: QuaLiKiz-v2.6.2 linear instability spectra based on JET experimental plasma profiles

manifests.large_numeric_files_policy: deferred: files are multi-GB and should be pulled on storage/GPU target before training or validation campaign
manifests.title: QLKNN11D training set

prepared_dataset_lanes.next_action: acquire matched public EFIT/P-EFIT, GEQDSK, or MDSplus-derived reconstruction artefacts
seal redistributable GEQDSK/EQDSK artefacts with source policy and SHA-256 manifests

run_order: Re-run the MAST EFM dataset readiness check before any campaign.
Run the MAST EFM trainer in dry-run mode and inspect the launch report.
Inspect the compute execution package and result templates before reserving GPU time.
Use explicit --execute only on workstation or external cloud compute with reserved GPU capacity.
Run a smoke campaign and publish compact metrics before spending multi-seed GPU budget.
Pull QLKNN/QuaLiKiz large payloads to storage-host storage only when storage and GPU allocation are reserved.
Keep all predictive and facility claims blocked until strict admission reports pass.
